jd_text: Role: Program Manager-Delivery Manager – Data & Analytics (Core Banking Transformation) Total Exp Range - 15+ Years Location: Dubai. UAE Domain: Banking Key Responsibilities: Data & Analytics Delivery (Primary Focus) • Own end-to-end delivery of Data & Analytics workstreams within the Core Banking transformation. • Manage delivery of: o Enterprise, operational, and regulatory reporting o Analytical data marts and consumption layers o Data validation, reconciliation, and controls • Lead the transition from legacy DWH to a modern data platform, including execution of the DWH demise strategy. Core Banking Data Expertise: • Provide deep domain oversight of Oracle Flexcube data models, transactions, products, and accounting flows. • Ensure accurate sourcing of data from Flexcube for downstream systems. • Support data mapping, transformation logic, and reconciliation during migration and cutover. • Act as a subject-matter lead for core banking data-related decisions. Integration & Real-Time Data Processing • Manage delivery of batch, near-real-time, and real-time data pipelines. • Oversee CDC and replication using GoldenGate. • Drive event streaming and real-time integrations using Kafka. • Ensure data consistency across upstream and downstream systems. Technology & Platform Oversight • Work closely with architecture and engineering teams across: o Hadoop-based data platforms o Azure cloud data services o Streaming, ingestion, and transformation frameworks • Ensure performance, scalability, security, and data quality standards are met. BI, Reporting & Consumption • Oversee delivery of dashboards and reports using Qlik and Power BI. • Ensure alignment between operational reports, regulatory submissions, and management MIS. • Manage UAT and business sign-offs for analytics deliverables. Delivery & Governance • Own detailed delivery plans, milestones, dependencies, and risks for Data & Analytics. • Track progress across multiple vendors and internal teams. • Drive issue resolution and decision-making forums. • Provide clear and concise delivery updates to senior stakeholders. Stakeholder & Vendor Management • Coordinate across core banking, finance, risk, compliance, and business teams. • Manage System Integrators and data platform vendors. • Support steering committees and program governance structures. ___________________ Required Skills & Experience: Mandatory • 15+ years of experience in Banking / Financial Services technology • At least one full Core Banking Migration, with direct involvement in data and reporting • Strong hands-on knowledge of: o Oracle Flexcube (data structures, transactions, interfaces) o Data Warehousing & Analytics platforms o Regulatory and MIS reporting Technical Skills • Working knowledge of: o Hadoop ecosystems o Azure data services o Kafka o GoldenGate o Qlik o Power BI Delivery Management • Proven experience delivering large-scale Data & Analytics programs • Strong command of Waterfall / Agile / Hybrid delivery models • Excellent risk, dependency, and stakeholder management skills Soft Skills • Strong communication and leadership skills • Ability to work in high-pressure, high-visibility transformation programs • Detail-oriented with strong problem-solving mindset ________________________________________ Preferred Qualifications • Experience with regulatory-driven banking data transformations • Exposure to cloud-native analytics platforms • PMP / SAFe / Agile delivery certifications
